name: context-graph
description: Builds structured context graphs from notes using normalized markers, hierarchical paths, and explicit or inferred relations.

interface.shortDescription: Classify notes, link related records, and fetch only the context needed for the current task.
interface.longDescription: Context Graph turns notes into a navigable graph with normalized markers, hierarchy paths, and explicit or inferred relations. It is designed to reduce prompt noise and improve retrieval quality by selecting compact, task-specific context packs instead of dumping whole knowledge bases.
defaultPrompt: Classify these notes with normalized markers and add missing hierarchy paths.
Build a compact context pack for this task using direct and one-hop related records.
Find repeated patterns across incidents and promote them into reusable rules.
